description_long: This is a plush, cartoonish monster toy with a bright green, textured body resembling fur. It has a single large cyclopean eye centered on its face, above a small, smiling mouth with three dark blue bumps that resemble teeth or nostrils. The toy features two prominent, spiraled horns on its head, colored with alternating orange and dark blue stripes. Its feet are large and flat, with orange-tipped toes, and its arms are short and rounded, extending slightly from its sides. The back of the toy is plain with a subtle slot, possibly for coins, and the overall form is chunky and soft, designed to be endearing and approachable. The playful color scheme and exaggerated features make it appealing for children and suitable for playful urban environments like parks or playgrounds.
description: A bright green, plush monster toy with a single large eye, striped orange and blue horns, and orange-tipped toes. Its soft, textured body and whimsical features make it visually striking and playful.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cyclopean eye, smiling mouth with three blue bumps, both striped horns, and orange-tipped toes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, one horn, and the rounded arm, with the body’s fur texture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back with a subtle slot and both horns, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right rear angle shows the back, one horn, and the right arm, with the toy’s chunky shape and fur texture.
attribute_facial_expression: The toy has a cheerful and friendly expression, with a wide, smiling mouth and a single large eye that appears open and inviting.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly extended to the sides and feet flat on the ground.
